prompt: I'm starting a new C++ command-line tool called 'image_tool' on my MacBook Pro (Apple Silicon). I want a modern setup with CMake, vcpkg, unit tests, formatting, linting, and VS Code debugging. Create the project scaffold in /tmp/cpp_eval_image_tool.
assertions: CMakeLists.txt sets CXX standard to 20 and exports compile commands
vcpkg.json includes gtest as a dependency
CMakePresets.json contains macos-arm64-debug and macos-arm64-tidy presets
A library target image_tool_lib and executable image_tool_app are defined
.vscode/launch.json has a CodeLLDB debug configuration for the app
README.md references the macOS Apple Silicon host profile and bootstrap command
